summary: The interruption closure manifest materializes the observed text-turn and fetch-shutdown recovery snapshots. Product smokes now prove deterministic cancel, image partial-resume, interrupted approval/export gate writers, and a latest real Codex OAuth in-flight image cancellation path that rejects late App Server image output before storage while writing separate app-storage recovery and cancel-signal JSON, with direct artifact regression coverage for that no-storage cancellation bundle. The product smoke artifacts are reproducibly ingested into a blocked closure candidate that preserves the remaining docs-bundle gap. The release remains blocked until packaged image partial-resume, packaged cancel, and interrupted approval/export artifacts are captured from the app surface and copied into the canonical evidence bundle.
